home.title: DilUp — Learn English online with a tutor who fits you
home.description: DilUp is Azerbaijan's online language platform. Find your perfect English tutor, set your budget, and start speaking from the very first lesson.

becomeTutor.title: Become a tutor on DilUp — set your own rate
becomeTutor.description: Teach English on DilUp. Set your own price, choose your hours, and earn on your terms with secure payments.

publicPages.faqStillText: Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is happy to help.

tutors.emptyText: Try changing price, availability or specialties.

copy.sueHeadline: Boost your English and your confidence.
copy.neaHeadline: Build confidence and fluency with clear practice.
copy.andrewHeadline: Improve your English quickly with expert guidance.

certificates.TEFL: Teaching English as a Foreign Language

sue-l.bio: From small talk to boardroom talk, you can improve your English one lesson at a time. I know the techniques and methods that work.
sue-l.about: Hi, I'm Sue. I love helping students build practical English for real situations. I worked in healthcare marketing for more than 20 years and have an MBA, so I am especially strong with business learners, job interview prep and confident everyday speaking.
sue-l.highlight: Perfect for speaking practice. Profile mentions vocabulary and listening.
sue-l.reviewSummary: Students say Sue tailors English lessons, gives clear explanations and timely corrections, and keeps classes well structured and engaging.

reviews.0: Sue is a great tutor. She is very professional and provides excellent strategies to learn English.
reviews.1: Sue is a really great teacher. She is patient, encouraging and truly cares about her students.
reviews.2: The classes are informative, focused and very easy to follow.
reviews.3: Exceptional lessons and very useful correction after each class.

nea-p.bio: Hi! I'm Nea, originally from Finland. I help students speak more naturally through practical lessons, gentle corrections and clear goals.
nea-p.about: I design lessons around your daily life, career goals and speaking confidence. You will get clear structure, friendly feedback and enough practice to make every lesson feel useful.
nea-p.highlight: Strong fit for students who want patient speaking practice.
nea-p.reviewSummary: Students describe Nea as warm, structured and very helpful for building everyday confidence.

reviews.0: Very kind, focused and easy to talk to.
reviews.1: I finally feel comfortable speaking at work.

andrew-s.bio: Expert guidance for IELTS speaking, writing and professional communication. Take a trial and build a plan for your next milestone.
andrew-s.about: My lessons are direct, practical and built around measurable progress. I work with ambitious learners who want exam results, sharper writing and more confident meetings.
andrew-s.highlight: Strong profile for IELTS speaking and writing practice.
andrew-s.reviewSummary: Students value Andrew's direct feedback, exam strategy and highly organized lesson plans.

reviews.0: His IELTS feedback is very clear and practical.
reviews.1: Great structure and strong business vocabulary work.

tutorProfile.caption: Start with a trial lesson and see if the teaching style fits you.
tutorProfile.highlightsNote: Based on tutor data and real student reviews

tutorProfile.scheduleNote: Choose the time for your first lesson. The timings are displayed in your local timezone.
tutorProfile.freeTrials: You still have 2 free tutor trials.

howItWorks.title: How <mark>DilUp</mark> works
howItWorks.step1Text: Filter by price, availability and specialty. Browse profiles and intro videos.
howItWorks.step2Text: Talk to your tutor in a live video lesson. No software to install.
howItWorks.step3Text: Keep your schedule, do the homework and see real results.

guarantee.title: A tutor match, guaranteed
guarantee.text: If your first lesson isn't the right fit, get a free trial with another tutor. No risk at all.

becomeTutor.title: Become a tutor, set your own rate
becomeTutor.text: Teach whenever and wherever you want. You're in control of your earnings — you set the price.

footer.tagline: DilUp connects learners with tutors who fit their goals, budget and schedule through live, one-to-one lessons.

onboarding.introText: Share your goal, level and weekly availability so we can shape the right tutor shortlist.
onboarding.subjectLabel: What do you want to learn?
onboarding.saveError: We saved your answers locally, but could not sync them yet.

visual.pathText: Goals, schedule and tutor fit in one path
